input.settingPrompt: A scholar's study tucked into a quiet wing of an old library-fortress, used for reading and small meals alike.

keyLocations.name: Great Stacks
keyLocations.description: Towering shelves of the main library.

identity.characteristics: A warm, wood-panelled room of medium size with a tall window, smelling of ink, wax, and old paper.

floor.texture: wide oiled boards, creaking and worn pale along the walking lines

ceiling.texture: cream plaster crossed by dark exposed beams

back.texture: warm honey panels framing a tall arched window

front.texture: a central panelled door flanked by slim pilasters

left.texture: shelved recesses sunk between the panels

right.texture: plain warm panels above a dado rail

objects.name: round oak table
objects.description: A sturdy circular oak table, its top ringed with old cup-stains.

objects.name: reading chair (north)
objects.description: A high-backed wooden chair with a worn cushion.

objects.name: reading chair (east)
objects.description: A high-backed wooden chair, twin to the others.

objects.name: reading chair (south)
objects.description: A high-backed wooden chair, twin to the others.

objects.name: reading chair (west)
objects.description: A high-backed wooden chair, twin to the others.

objects.name: pewter goblet
objects.description: A dented pewter goblet, half-full of cold wine.

objects.name: stack of books
objects.description: A leaning stack of three heavy leather-bound books.

objects.name: tall bookshelf
objects.description: A tall bookshelf crammed with scrolls and codices, taller than a man.

objects.name: round mirror
objects.description: A small round mirror in a tarnished silver frame.

objects.name: large woven rug
objects.description: A large round-cornered woven rug in faded reds and golds.

arrangementProse: The round oak table stands at the heart of the room, with its four high-backed reading chairs tucked evenly around it at north, east, south, and west, each pushed close enough that its seat slides under the table's edge. On the tabletop sit the pewter goblet and, beside it, the leaning stack of books. The tall bookshelf rises against the left wall, flat to it. On the back wall hangs the round mirror, set lower than a portrait would be, at about face height for someone standing. Beneath the whole table-and-chairs grouping lies the large woven rug, centered so the chairs all rest upon it.

Tucked against the west edge of the table.

Centered beneath the round table (and the chairs around it).
